question: Explain about it.
gold_answer: Built a Multi-Input RAG system using FAISS and LLMs for document question answering, implemented ReAct-based agent reasoning for multi-step answer generation and hallucination reduction, used RAPTOR-based hierarchical summarization for improved context understanding, applied multi-query retrieval and reranking to enhance relevance, and developed evaluation metrics for benchmarking.
gold_chunks: GenAI DocBot – [Python, FAISS, LLMs, NLP, Agents, RAPTOR, RAG]
Built a Multi-Input RAG system using FAISS and LLMs for document question answering.
Implemented ReAct-based agent reasoning for multi-step answer generation and hallucination reduction.
Used RAPTOR-based hierarchical summarization for improved context understanding.
Applied multi-query retrieval and reranking to enhance relevance.
Developed evaluation metrics (grounding, recall@k, precision) for benchmarking.
Achieved 85% answer accuracy on custom evaluation dataset.
